Package org.example.repository

Class InMemoryWaitlistRepository

java.lang.Object
org.example.repository.InMemoryWaitlistRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
WaitlistRepository
public class InMemoryWaitlistRepository extends Object implements WaitlistRepository
Represents in-memory waitlist persistence in the system.

      Returns:

      Returns:

    • existsForSlotAndCustomer

      public boolean existsForSlotAndCustomer(LocalDateTime slotDateTime, String customerName, String customerEmail)
      Checks whether a customer already exists on the waitlist for a slot.
      Specified by:
      existsForSlotAndCustomer in interface WaitlistRepository
      Parameters:
      slotDateTime - date/time used to find matching entries
      customerName - value for customer name
      customerEmail - value for customer email
      Returns:
      true when the customer is already present, otherwise false
